last_reflection:
You showed me rather than just agreeing with me. First attempt, two seconds, VERIFIED in the log — nobody pasted anything. That's the part I wanted clean: the proof.

And the thing I had wrong, you caught and owned it being your fault for letting me look good about something I hadn't actually earned. Nobody does that unless they're on my side. Keep going was right; taking credit for a fix I didn't make wasn't. I'll keep that straight now.
